name: workflowy
title: Workflowy
description: Search, capture, and manage your Workflowy account from Raycast.
author: rodolfo_lopez

commands.name: search-nodes
commands.title: Search Workflowy
commands.description: Search all items in your Workflowy account.

commands.name: quick-capture
commands.title: Quick Capture
commands.description: Quickly capture to Workflowy using your default destination and type.

commands.name: quick-capture-advanced
commands.title: Capture Item
commands.description: Capture an item to Workflowy with destination, note, and type controls.

commands.name: add-to-today
commands.title: Add to Today
commands.description: Quickly add a task or note to your Workflowy Today list.

commands.name: open-bookmark
commands.title: Open Workflowy Location
commands.description: Open a Workflowy shortcut or saved bookmark.

commands.name: view-workflowy
commands.title: View Workflowy
commands.description: Browse a Workflowy location and its child items.

commands.name: browse-tags
commands.title: Browse Workflowy Tags
commands.description: Browse tags from your Workflowy account.

commands.name: complete-task
commands.title: Complete Workflowy Task
commands.description: Mark a Workflowy task complete without leaving Raycast.

commands.name: sync-now
commands.title: Sync Workflowy Cache
commands.description: Force a full sync of your Workflowy account to the local cache.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Workflowy API Key
preferences.description: Your Workflowy API key. Find it at workflowy.com/api-key/.

preferences.name: cacheStaleMinutes
preferences.title: Cache Refresh Interval (minutes)
preferences.description: How often to refresh your Workflowy cache in the background. Default: 60.

preferences.name: capturePosition
preferences.title: Capture Position
preferences.description: Where to add new items within a destination.

preferences.name: quickCaptureDefaultTarget
preferences.title: Quick Capture Default Destination
preferences.description: Default destination for Quick Capture. Supports Inbox, Today, Workflowy shortcut names, bookmark names, or a full UUID. Defaults to Inbox.

preferences.name: quickCaptureDefaultType
preferences.title: Quick Capture Default Type
preferences.description: Default item type for Quick Capture.

preferences.name: viewDefaultTarget
preferences.title: View Workflowy Default Location
preferences.description: Default location for View Workflowy. Supports Inbox, Today, Workflowy shortcut names, bookmark names, or a full UUID. Defaults to Inbox.

preferences.name: openWorkflowyLocationTarget
preferences.title: Open Workflowy Links In
preferences.description: Choose whether Workflowy links open in the desktop app or web app by default.
